reviews.comment:
Compramos cafés en la cafeteria de la estación de servicio y nos lo dieron hierviendo. Un peligro total. El que no se quemo la lengua, se quemo la mano en el auto o la pierna. Peligrosisimo! un desproposito!

(Translated by Google)
We bought coffee at the gas station café and they served it to us boiling hot. A total hazard. Those who didn't burn their tongues burned their hands in the car or their legs. Extremely dangerous! Outrageous!

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos que haya tenido una mala experiencia. Gracias por su comentario
